title: Tunic decipher Codex pages — narrative-decifrabile sopra Hades Codex panel
summary: Decision codified 2026-04-27 §H.4 ADOPT (TOP RECOMMENDATION ROI 8/10). Codex entry pages con glyph language progressively-decipherable. Layer sopra Hades Codex panel spec'd (M-2026-04-27-005 economy-hades-multi-currency-pact-menu). Fits A.L.I.E.N.A. wiki in-game progressiva. Player sblocca decifrazione via gameplay events (kills enemy archetype X N volte → unlock 1 glyph famiglia). Inizio: 5 glyph pilot + 1 page sample. Cross-pillar P4 (MBTI hints in glyph art) + cross-narrative.
